form.formComment: Most recently sat behind the speed prior to fading second last of 10 at Bairnsdale Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1200m, on a slow track; 9 len behind I Said So carrying 59.5kg at $8.50. The race before that 8th of 11 at Wangaratta Mdn-Sw on February 8 over 1400m, 8 len behind Hotei Senshi carrying 59.5kg at $3.70. Passing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start bumped by Wrenlee. Raced keenly in the early stages.
Raced three wide without cover for the majority of the event.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of ten months. Finished off last preparation second of 10 at Donald Mdn-Sw June 21 over 1356m, soft track; a neck behind Star Canto with 59.5kg at $12. First up last campaign tenth of 14 at Ararat Mdn-Sw May 10 over 1300m, 12 len behind Bold Strike carrying 59.5kg at $201. Should go well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 500m shifted out and carried Ironbox outwards slightly.

form.formComment: Gelding by Justify facing the starter for the first time. Fitter for a jump-out on March 24 at Echuca when finished fourth. Prepared to give him this run.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months second last of 11 at Swan Hill Mdn-Sw on March 15 over 1300m, 11 len behind Monix carrying 59kg at $201. Previously second-up eased back early on 6th of 12 at Benalla Mdn-Sw on September 26 over 1206m, 6 len behind Hayatake with 57kg at $151. Will need to improve sharply to figure.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced three wide and without cover throughout the event.

form.formComment: Resuming after a four months break. Finished off last preparation sixth of 12 at Wangaratta Mdn-Sw December 22 over 1400m, soft track; 4 len behind Maketime carrying 58kg at $5. On debut third of 8 at Wangaratta Mdn-Sw November 4 over 1300m, in the wet; a long neck behind Please Me Do with 58kg at $31. Everything points to a positive return.

form.formComment: Jumped as a despised roughie at debut, 6th of 14 at Wagga Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1000m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Minks Written with 58.5kg at $201. Others more appealing.

form.formComment: He is resuming after a six-and-a-half months break. Not seen since he finished last of 7 at Tatura 3yo Mdn-Sw September 30 over 1100m, 7 len behind Go Left carrying 58kg at $201. On debut seventh of 9 at Seymour Mdn-Sw August 31 over 1000m, on heavy track; 10 len behind Brash Lass carrying 55kg at $14. Will improve on whatever he does in this.
